title: Environmental Health Specialist
description: Fortrea is a global provider of integrated clinical research services with operations in 100+ countries. You'll ensure environmental and occupational health compliance across our research sites.
responsibilities: Conduct environmental audits and health assessments of clinical research sites
Ensure compliance with OSHA and EPA regulations at all facilities
Develop and implement occupational health and safety protocols
Investigate incidents and recommend corrective actions
Train staff on environmental health best practices

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Environmental Health, Public Health, or related field
requirements.experience_years: 2-4 years of occupational or environmental health experience
certifications: CIH (Certified Industrial Hygienist) or working toward

benefits: Professional development and continuing education support
Employee assistance program (EAP) with mental health services
